_comment: Rename to .claude/mcp.json. This registers MCP servers (external tools and data providers) available to all Claude Code sessions in this project. Add API keys via environment variables, never hardcode.

mem0._comment: Mem0 hosted MCP server — cross-IDE persistent memory. Same MEM0_API_KEY + same MEM0_DEFAULT_USER_ID on every machine gives shared memory across Claude Code, Antigravity, Windsurf, Replit, etc.

_example_playwright._comment: OPTIONAL — example: Playwright MCP for browser automation in E2E tests. Uncomment and rename to 'playwright' to enable. Useful for UI verification beyond the test suite.

_example_github._comment: OPTIONAL — example: GitHub MCP for repo operations beyond local git. Useful if you want agents to read PRs, issues, etc.
